name: Elegance Premium Leather Crossbody Handbag
description: Exude sophistication with this premium leather handbag, designed for the modern woman. Featuring a sleek finish and durable hardware, it's the perfect accessory to transition from office meetings to evening parties. Its spacious interior ensures all your essentials are organized in style.

specifications.material: High-Quality PU Leather with Silk Lining
specifications.strap: Adjustable and Detachable Gold-tone Chain Strap
specifications.closure_type: Magnetic Snap with Smooth Interior Zipper
specifications.size: 10.5" L x 4.5" W x 7.5" H (Medium Size)
specifications.pockets: 1 Main Compartment, 1 Inner Zipper Pocket, and 2 Accessory Slots
specifications.durability: Scratch-resistant and Easy to Clean Surface
specifications.occasion: Ideal for Weddings, Parties, and Professional Daily use
